title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Radiologist with drive and ambition, Columbia Asia Advisory Limited in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
